finding_results.notes: Inserted four immediate fallout beats (rib pain collapse, failed drawstring task, interrupted speech, and regulated breathing under physical strain) before the RA interruption appears, delaying tonal relief until consequence lands.
Replaced hedged affect with direct emotional action (Eli crying at the sink), followed by an immediate observable consequence (ink-smearing and forced rewrite of the call card).
Activated the $420 stake through concrete attempts (claiming extra shifts and seeking plasma income) and explicit counterforces (probation overtime lock, bid freeze, and unavailable screening slots).

Preserved boundary terms while breaking checklist cadence via June's abrupt tonal spike, hard interruption, and emotionally messy non-template warning before returning to precise conditions and confirmation.

summary: Chapter 18 now maintains post-confession pressure before any comedic side beat, renders Eli's affect through direct embodied action, converts the $420 shortfall into enacted causality with resistance, and sharpens June's boundary voice away from clean recital while preserving all required terms and continuity constraints.
